title: EmDash plugin manifest
description: Hand-authored manifest for publishing a plugin to the EmDash plugin registry. Lives next to the plugin's `package.json` as `emdash-plugin.jsonc`.

__schema0.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema describing this file. Editors use this for completion and validation.

__schema1.title: Slug
__schema1.description: URL-safe plugin identifier within the publisher's namespace. ASCII letter then letters/digits/hyphens/underscores, max 64 characters. Combined with the publisher DID, this is the registry's primary key.

__schema2.title: Version
__schema2.description: Plugin version. Semver 2.0 subset; build-metadata `+...` is disallowed (the atproto record-key alphabet has no `+`). Bumped on every release.

__schema3.title: License
__schema3.description: SPDX license expression (e.g. "MIT", "Apache-2.0", "MIT OR Apache-2.0"). Required on first publish; ignored on subsequent publishes (the existing profile wins).

__schema4.title: Publisher
__schema4.description: Atproto DID or handle of the publishing identity. Pinned on first publish to prevent accidental publishes from a different account. DIDs are recommended (durable); handles work but are mutable.

__schema5.title: Capabilities
__schema5.description: Trust contract: what runtime APIs the plugin is allowed to use. Changing this between releases requires a version bump because installed users have consented to the old contract.

__schema7.title: Allowed hosts
__schema7.description: Allow-list of outbound host patterns when `network:request` is declared. Subdomain wildcards use a leading `*.`. Required (non-empty) when `network:request` is declared without `network:request:unrestricted`.

__schema9.title: Storage
__schema9.description: Storage collections the plugin uses. Each collection is namespaced to this plugin at runtime.

__schema11.title: Storage collection
__schema11.description: Index configuration for a single storage collection. Indexes are either single field names or composite (array of field names).

__schema16.title: Admin surface
__schema16.description: Pages and widgets the plugin exposes in the admin UI. The plugin's `admin` route handler renders Block Kit content for each path / widget id at runtime.

__schema18.title: Admin page
__schema18.description: A single admin page declaration. The plugin's `admin` route handler is responsible for rendering Block Kit content for this path.

__schema28.title: Author
__schema28.description: A single author entry. Mirrors the lexicon's author shape.

__schema30.description: Author's homepage or profile URL. Either this or `email` is recommended.

__schema31.description: Author's contact email. Either this or `url` is recommended.

__schema32.title: Authors (multiple)
__schema32.description: Multi-author form. Mutually exclusive with `author`. Use the singular `author` if there is only one.

__schema34.title: Security contact
__schema34.description: A single security contact. At least one of `url` or `email` must be present.

__schema35.description: Security disclosure URL (e.g. a security.txt or vulnerability-reporting page). Either this or `email` is required.

__schema36.description: Security contact email. Either this or `url` is required.

__schema37.title: Security contacts (multiple)
__schema37.description: Multi-contact form. Mutually exclusive with `security`. Use the singular `security` if there is only one.

__schema38.title: Display name
__schema38.description: Human-readable name shown in directory listings. Defaults to the plugin's `id` when omitted.

__schema39.title: Description
__schema39.description: Short description (<= 140 graphemes by FAIR convention). Aggregators may truncate longer values when displaying in compact lists.

__schema42.title: Profile sections
__schema42.description: Long-form package documentation (description / installation / faq / changelog / security). Each value is CommonMark Markdown (inline or a `{ file }` ref) capped at 20000 bytes / 2000 graphemes. Rendered on the package's registry page.

__schema44.title: Section value
__schema44.description: Either inline CommonMark Markdown or a `{ file }` reference to a sibling Markdown file.

__schema45.description: Inline CommonMark Markdown for this section. Capped at 20000 bytes / 2000 graphemes.

__schema46.title: Section file reference
__schema46.description: Loads the section's Markdown from a sibling file instead of inlining it in the manifest.

__schema47.description: Path to a CommonMark Markdown file, relative to the manifest. Its content is read inline into the section at publish time.

__schema52.title: Source repository
__schema52.description: HTTPS URL of the plugin's source repository. Surfaced in registry listings.

__schema53.title: Release
__schema53.description: Per-release fields: environment constraints (`requires`) and media artifacts (icon / screenshot / banner).

__schema54.title: Environment requirements
__schema54.description: Host environment constraints for this release, keyed by `env:*` (e.g. "env:astro", "env:emdash") with semver-range values. EmDash refuses to install a release whose constraints the host does not satisfy.

__schema57.title: Artifacts
__schema57.description: Release media artifacts. `icon` and `banner` are single images; `screenshots` is a gallery array.

__schema59.title: Artifact file reference
__schema59.description: A media file (PNG / JPEG / WebP / GIF / AVIF) bundled into a release as an icon, screenshot, or banner.

__schema60.description: Path to the image file, relative to the manifest. Resolved, hashed, measured, and uploaded at publish time.

__schema61.description: BCP 47 language tag for a localised artifact (e.g. "en", "pt-BR").

__schema63.title: Screenshots
__schema63.description: Screenshot gallery for the plugin's detail page (<= 8 entries).
